hasAttributes.name: loanApplicationId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for entity instances.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date when the loan application was created.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was modified.

hasAttributes.name: statecode
hasAttributes.description: Status of the Loan Application.

hasAttributes.name: statuscode
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the Loan Application.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Sequence number of the import that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: timeZoneRuleVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: UTCConversionTimeZoneCode
hasAttributes.description: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Required name field.

hasAttributes.name: amortizationType
hasAttributes.description: Type of amortization for the loan.

hasAttributes.name: applicationnumber
hasAttributes.description: Unique number assigned to the loan application.

hasAttributes.name: balloonAmount
hasAttributes.description: Final Balloon payment required to fully pay off the loan.

hasAttributes.name: balloonamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Amount of the balloon payment in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: balloonTermCount
hasAttributes.description: Term in months for Balloon mortgage if "Is Balloon Payment" indicator is "Yes".

hasAttributes.name: costofimprovements
hasAttributes.description: The cost needed for improving the value of an asset.

hasAttributes.name: costofimprovements_Base
hasAttributes.description: Amount of the cost of improvements in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: depositAmount
hasAttributes.description: Amount of money to be paid as a deposit for the loan.

hasAttributes.name: depositamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Amount of the deposit in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: describeimprovements
hasAttributes.description: Description of the improvement.

hasAttributes.name: discountpointstotalamount
hasAttributes.description: Fees to be paid to the lender at closing in exchange for a reduced interest rate.

hasAttributes.name: discountpointstotalamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the Discount points total amount in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: downPayment
hasAttributes.description: Amount of down payment.

hasAttributes.name: downpayment_Base
hasAttributes.description: Amount of the down payment in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: escrowPaymentAmount
hasAttributes.description: Amount to be paid to escrow.

hasAttributes.name: escrowpaymentamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Amount of the escrow payment in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: financingType
hasAttributes.description: The financing type for the loan application.

hasAttributes.name: firstMonthInterestAmount
hasAttributes.description: Calculated installment to be paid for the first month.

hasAttributes.name: firstmonthinterestamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the first month interest amount in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: integrationKey
hasAttributes.description: Key provided by the SI for updating the current record.

hasAttributes.name: interestOnlyTermMonthCount
hasAttributes.description: Term in months for interest only if "InterestOnlyIndicator" is true.

hasAttributes.name: interestRate
hasAttributes.description: The loan application interest rate.

hasAttributes.name: interestType
hasAttributes.description: The type of interest applied to the loan: fixed, periodical, floating, etc.

hasAttributes.name: isBalloonPayment
hasAttributes.description: When "Yes", indicates that a final Balloon payment is required to fully pay off the loan.

hasAttributes.name: isInterestOnly
hasAttributes.description: When "Yes", indicated that the loan is Interest only.

hasAttributes.name: isNegativeAmortization
hasAttributes.description: When "Yes", indicates that the loan terms allow unpaid interest to be added to the principal of the loan that can or will result in negative amortization.

hasAttributes.name: lendingLimit
hasAttributes.description: The lending limit applicable to the loan application, based on the specific loan guidelines.

hasAttributes.name: lendinglimit_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the lending limit in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: loanApplicationClosingDate
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the loan application was closed.

hasAttributes.name: loanCategory
hasAttributes.description: Describes the category of the loan.

hasAttributes.name: loanOriginator
hasAttributes.description: User representing a banking officer who was the originator of, and owns, the loan application.

hasAttributes.name: loanorrefinancePurpose
hasAttributes.description: The purpose of the loan or refinance.

hasAttributes.name: loanTerm
hasAttributes.description: Number of months over which the loan will be paid.

hasAttributes.name: loanToValue
hasAttributes.description: Loan to value for a given proposition.

hasAttributes.name: loanType
hasAttributes.description: The type of the requested loan.

hasAttributes.name: maxLoanToValue
hasAttributes.description: Maximum loan to value allowed for the proposition.

hasAttributes.name: noteAmount
hasAttributes.description: The total cost of the loan, as disclosed in the Note.

hasAttributes.name: noteamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the note amount in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: primaryApplicant
hasAttributes.description: The main applicant for the loan application.

hasAttributes.name: principalAmount
hasAttributes.description: Amount of money borrowed for the loan.

hasAttributes.name: principalamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Amount of the principal in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: refinanceType
hasAttributes.description: Type of refinance loan.

hasAttributes.name: sourceofDownPayment
hasAttributes.description: Source of down payment, settlement charges, and/or subordinate financing.

hasAttributes.name: verificationStatus
hasAttributes.description: The loan application verification status.

hasAttributes.name: primaryMemberHelper
hasAttributes.description: A calculated field helping determine if a loan application contact is the primary member of the loan application.

definitions.description: Document filled out by a potential borrower to apply for a loan; provides financial and other information to the lender.
